title: crusea subulata
intro: Crusea subulata, also known as Wild Strawberry or Strawberry Plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Gentianaceae. It is a perennial herb native to North America, characterized by its small white or pink flowers and edible red fruits. The medicinal properties of Crusea subulata include its ability to lower blood sugar levels and act as an anti-inflammatory agent, making it useful in the treatment of various health conditions. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its health benefits, including the relief of digestive issues and the reduction of inflammation.
